title: Artificial Analysis surfaces HappyHorse publicly
summary: Artificial Analysis public discussion helps turn HappyHorse-1.0 into a visible benchmark topic.
impact: Creates the first major public benchmark-facing visibility wave.

title: High-reach X accounts amplify the benchmark story
summary: Public X discussion expands the topic through benchmark interpretation and comparison framing.
impact: Pushes the story beyond a single benchmark page into wider AI-tool discourse.

title: Reddit discussion broadens the topic
summary: Public Reddit threads carry the topic into broader AI communities with more skepticism and open-weights interest.
impact: Shifts the conversation from visibility alone toward release expectations and trust questions.

title: Public X surfaces strengthen legitimacy discussion
summary: The HappyHorseATH account and Alibaba Group post become part of the public narrative around attribution and legitimacy.
impact: Strengthens the social discussion layer without replacing direct release evidence.
